name: com.ajoygames.motionkit
description: High-performance recording and playback framework for Unity. Record interactions on any GameObject and generate reusable recording assets, prefabs and animation clips that play back at runtime with a clean API. Modular track system, zero-allocation playback, persistent GUID bindings, recorder profiles, a built-in timeline editor, a universal event system, versioned recordings with automatic migration, and a public plugin SDK. Platform independent; XR is an optional, guarded module.

samples.description: A recordable sample interaction plus a playback demo.
